pages.metaTitle: Retail - social.plus for the Retail industry
pages.metaDescription: Transform browsing into shared discovery with shoppable content, real customer stories, and an in-app community that returns.
pages.content:
# Turn your retail app into a community customers return to
Transform browsing into shared discovery with shoppable content, real customer stories, and in-app community.
## The retail problem isn’t traffic. It’s retention.
### Acquisition costs keep rising while customer loyalty keeps falling. Your users browse, buy once, and disappear.
Acquisition is expensive
CPMs and CPCs climb every quarter – but customers still churn after the first purchase.
Engagement happens everywhere except your app
Shoppers scroll inspiration on TikTok and Instagram, not with you.
Zero-party data is disappearing
Without community interactions, it's harder to learn what customers actually like.
Content and commerce are disconnected
You showcase products – but not the stories, creators, or community that influence purchases.
## From inspiration to purchase, all in one flow
## Build a vibrant in-app shopping community
Turn static product browsing into a dynamic experience with UGC, product tagging, live updates, and creator content.
## Unlock zero-party insights that no pixel can give you
Learn what shoppers want directly from their behavior.
## Your own white-label retail media channel
Drive incremental revenue with branded content that lives directly inside your customer journey.
## Use cases that turn browsing into buying
## Shoppable Feed
Let users explore real outfits, product drops, and reviews created by other shoppers.
## Product Discovery Groups
Create hubs for beauty, fashion, home décor, skincare, streetwear, and more.
## Influencer Profiles
Give influencers a home inside your app that turn followers into fans.
## Livestream Shopping
Host product demos, Q&As, and flash sales with chat-powered interaction.
## Product Showcase Clips
Let customers share outfit inspiration, unboxings, and tips through short-form video.
## Customer Reviews
Bring authenticity into every product page with UGC pulled from your community.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
UGC, reactions, comments, and rich media.
## Groups & Forums
Topic-driven discovery.
## Messaging & Chat
Customer-to-customer or customer-to-brand.
## Livestreams
Interactive video with real-time reactions.
## User Profiles
Rich shopper identities.
## Shoppable UGC
Product tagging that links directly to PDPs.
## Moderation Tools
For safe, brand-friendly conversations.
## Analytics & Insights
Engagement tracking and sentiment analysis.
## Trusted by leading retail brands
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.

pages.metaTitle: Fitness - social.plus for the Fitness industry
pages.metaDescription: Boost motivation, retention, and lifetime value through in-app social features that inspire progress and connection.
pages.content:
# Turn your app into an active community
Boost motivation, retention, and lifetime value through in-app social features that inspire progress and connection.
## The challenge isn’t sign-ups. It’s consistency.
### Your users start strong, but without connection, most drop off after a few weeks.
Motivation fades fast
Once users stop seeing results, churn follows.
Communities live elsewhere
Your users discuss progress on Reddit or Facebook instead of your app.
Limited personalization
Without social data, workouts and content stay generic.
Retention drops post-goal
When challenges end, users leave — instead of discovering new goals or peers.
## The fitness engagement playbook
## Build a motivational community
Turn isolated workouts into shared achievements.
## Analyze user intent and progress
Collect behavioral and emotional insights that predict churn and identify advocates.
## Turn engagement into new revenue
Empower creators, coaches, and wellness brands to reach engaged users authentically.
## Key in-app use cases for fitness & wellness
## Progress Feed
Let users share workouts, photos, and milestones – fueling motivation across the community.
## Nutrition & Wellness Groups
Bring together people with shared goals – plant-based diets, sleep tracking, mindfulness.
## Coach Profiles
Connect members directly with verified coaches through posts, chat, and livestreams.
## Workout Livestreams
Host interactive training sessions with real-time reactions and shout-outs.
## Workout Clips
Share workout highlights, daily check-ins, or transformation moments in short-form video.
## Goal Journals & Streaks
Encourage consistency through daily check-ins and progress badges.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
Share posts, media, reactions, and progress logs.
## Groups & Forums
Themed fitness communities and goal-based rooms.
## Messaging & Chat
Connect coaches and members through chat.
## Livestreams
Real-time classes and motivation sessions.
## User Profiles
Custom avatars, bios, and achievements.
## Stories & Clips
Share bite-sized workout stories and clips.
## Moderation Tools
Safe and supportive environment.
## Analytics & Insights
Track engagement, progress, and intent.
## Trusted by leading fitness brands
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.

pages.metaTitle: Travel - social.plus for the Travel industry
pages.metaDescription: Turn every trip, check-in, and review into shared experiences that inspire others, with in-app community features built for travel apps by social.plus.
pages.content:
# Turn your app into a social journey
Transform every trip, check-in, and review into shared experiences that inspire others – all inside your app.
## You sell destinations. But lose the moments.
### Travelers connect everywhere except your app, leaving engagement, data, and loyalty on the table.
Disconnected experience
Users plan in one app, book in another, and share elsewhere.
Rising acquisition costs
Retargeting travelers is expensive, and less effective every year.
Limited community
Post-trip engagement drops once the booking ends.
Missed insights
Without social behavior data, personalization is limited to transactions.
## The travel engagement playbook
## Inspire and connect travelers
Create a living community of explorers inside your app, not on social media.
## Understand traveler intent in real time
Learn what inspires bookings and repeat visits through authentic engagement data.
## Create new revenue streams through inspiration
Turn traveler content and brand partnerships into authentic commerce moments.
## Use cases that turn browsing into buying
## Travel Journal Feed
Turn trips and check-ins into social storytelling moments.
## Destination Groups
Let travelers connect through shared interests – from food to hiking to design.
## Content Creator Profiles
Feature travel influencers and local guides sharing authentic experiences.
## Experience Livestreams
Broadcast events, tours, or destination highlights with real-time interaction.
## Trip Highlight Stories
Highlight daily adventures, hotel stays, and local discoveries through a stories format.
## Trip Reviews
Encourage authentic peer recommendations and discussions inside your app.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
Share posts, comments, and media from trips.
## Groups & Forums
Build traveler communities by interest or destination.
## Messaging & Chat
Connect travelers, locals, and hosts through chat.
## Livestreams
Stream experiences, events, or destination tours in real time.
## User Profiles
Traveler identities with journeys, favorites, and badges.
## Stories & Clips
Share travel moments and  highlights in short-form.
## Moderation Tools
Keep your community authentic and safe.
## Analytics & Insights
Measure engagement, sentiment, and traveler intent.
## Trusted by leading travel brands
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.

pages.metaTitle: Sport - social.plus for the Sport industry
pages.metaDescription: Bring fans, teams, and players together with real-time feeds, chat, and fan-driven content built directly into your sports app with social.plus.
pages.content:
# Turn your app into a live fan community
Bring fans, teams, and players together through real-time feeds, chat, and fan-driven content – all inside your app.
## Your fans are passionate. But engage elsewhere.
### They discuss matches on social media, follow highlights on YouTube, and connect on third-party platforms. You lose both attention and insight.
Dispersed engagement
Fans switch between platforms for content, discussion, and live updates.
Limited monetization
Most fan interactions happen off-platform, away from your sponsors.
No direct fan insights
Social data sits with third-party networks, not with your brand.
One-way experiences
Apps focus on stats and scores, not the community behind them.
## From spectators to superfans, the engagement loop
## Make fandom interactive
Turn every match, post, and highlight into a shared experience.
## Understand fan behavior and sentiment
Discover what fans care about most, and tailor engagement strategies.
## Transform engagement into new revenue
Turn interaction into measurable sponsorship and commerce opportunities.
## Key in-app use cases for sports
## Exclusive Team Feeds
Offer verified content directly from athletes, coaches, or clubs.
## Fan Club Groups
Unite supporters under one banner – by team, league, or passion.
## Athlete Profiles
Showcase player stories, stats, and personal updates inside your app.
## Match Livestreams
Let fans react, celebrate, and debate in real time during every game.
## Highlight & Replay Clips
Share behind-the-scenes moments, highlights, and player reactions in short-form video.
## Polls & Predictions
Gamify engagement with match predictions and community leaderboards.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
Stream highlights, reactions, and community posts
## Groups & Forums
Build fan clubs, team hubs, and topic-based communities
## Messaging & Chat
Connect fans through live and group chat
## Livestreams
Broadcast events, interviews, and live reactions
## User Profiles
Fan identities with favorite teams and achievements
## Stories & Clips
Share game highlights and behind-the-scenes moments
## Moderation Tools
Keep discussions respectful and brand-safe
## Analytics & Insights
Track engagement, sentiment, and sponsor value
## Leading brands grow with social.plus
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.
